ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "c_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "morphology" TEXT /* Physical characteristics of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("c_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "to_locality" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the locality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the locality */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the locality */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the locality */,
  "geological_features" TEXT /* Geological features of the locality */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Typical climate of the locality */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("to_locality")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_collections" (
  "rc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the research collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research collection */,
  "date_initiated" TEXT /* Date when the research collection was initiated */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the research collection was completed */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recorder_details" (
  "recorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recorder */,
  "recorder_name" TEXT /* Name of the recorder */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the recorder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the recorder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recorder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "determiners" (
  "determiner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each determiner */,
  "determiner_name" TEXT /* Name of the determiner */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the determiner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the determiner */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Field of expertise of the determiner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("determiner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "herbaria" (
  "herb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each herbarium */,
  "herb_name" TEXT /* Name of the herbarium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the herbarium */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the herbarium */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("herb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_classes" (
  "vc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation class */,
  "vc_name" TEXT /* Name of the vegetation class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vegetation class */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Detailed characteristics of the vegetation class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_types" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat type */,
  "common_species" TEXT /* Common species found in the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "ur_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ur_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE species_records (
  sr_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, /* Unique identifier for each record */
  rc_id INTEGER, /* Foreign key to research_collections */
  c_id INTEGER, /* Foreign key to species */
  FOREIGN KEY (rc_id) REFERENCES research_collections(rc_id),
  FOREIGN KEY (c_id) REFERENCES species(c_id)
)
